title: OBF export adapter for AAC board builders
context: Open Board Format (OBF) is the open interchange standard used by AAC board builders (e.g. CoughDrop-style apps) to import symbol sets. For open-pictograms to be reusable in the AAC ecosystem, it must export a valid OBF file per symbol or per board, including concept IDs, multilingual labels (from the per-symbol metadata), CC-BY-4.0 attribution, and correct SVG/PNG references. The adapter must live in adapters/obf/ per the Elyos architecture (all ecosystem-specific logic in adapters/).
objective: Implement the OBF export adapter (adapters/obf/) that produces valid Open Board Format output from the per-symbol metadata and SVG/PNG exports, ready for import by AAC board builders.
acceptanceCriteria: Adapter produces a valid OBF file (or set of files) from the per-symbol metadata records; OBF output validates against the Open Board Format schema.
OBF output includes: concept ID mapped to OBF button/symbol fields, multilingual labels from the metadata labels field, CC-BY-4.0 attribution string, and correct SVG and PNG image references.
Adapter lives in adapters/obf/ (per Elyos architecture); contains no vendor-specific logic outside the adapter directory.
Adapter is TypeScript/ESM, pnpm-based, passes pnpm build && pnpm lint, is licensed MIT, and is integrated into the build pipeline.
At least one round-trip test: an OBF output file is generated from the seed set metadata and manually verified to import correctly into an OBF-consuming tool or validator.
resources: Open Board Format (OBF) — open AAC board interchange format
output: adapters/obf/ TypeScript/ESM OBF export adapter integrated into the pipeline; licensed MIT. PR opened against main with passing build and lint.
